Artist Trust's Artist Support Programs include business practices workshops and
webinars, online resources, networking and mentorship events, town halls, an annual
artist survey, and other programs that provide career-training and professional
development opportunities for artists and help us discover and make visible issues
impacting the livelihoods of artists. Over 2,000 artists and community members were
Other Programs include the Arts Innovator Award, Conductive Garboil Grant, Twining
Humber Lifetime Achievement Award, Gar LaSalle Storyteller Award, and the James W Ray
Fellowships award $7,500 to practicing professional artists of exceptional talent and
demonstrated ability. The Fellowship is a merit based, not a project based award.
